$comment: SHA-256 pins for the eval datasets fetched by scripts/fetch-eval-datasets.mjs (audit 2026-07-04, E5). Benchmark baselines and any future release-full gate depend on these files, so a changed or substituted upstream file must fail the fetch loudly instead of silently shifting scores. Source URLs are pinned to immutable revisions (an HF revision sha / a GitHub commit sha), and the sha256 is verified after every download AND for already-present files. Refresh a pin deliberately with `node scripts/fetch-eval-datasets.mjs --force --update-lock`.

longmemeval.note: LongMemEval_S (arXiv:2410.10813). The sha256 is the file's authoritative HF LFS oid at the pinned revision. Upstream has deprecated this dataset in favour of xiaowu0162/longmemeval-cleaned (longmemeval_s_cleaned.json, which removes noisy history sessions); switching variants changes benchmark numbers and is an eval-baseline decision, not a fetch-script one - keep the paper-canonical file pinned here until an eval pass decides otherwise.

locomo.note: Real LOCOMO conversations (arXiv:2402.17753); commit-pinned raw.githubusercontent.com URL, hash computed from a verified download.

dmr.note: DMR (MemGPT/Letta, arXiv:2310.08560) has no stable public direct URL; supply GRAPHORIN_DMR_URL with your copy. UNPINNED until a maintainer records a hash with --update-lock - the fetch script warns loudly about this.
